Comfortable Facilities: The property features a restaurant, bar, lounge, and outdoor fireplace. Additional amenities include a fitness room, beauty services, and an outdoor play area, catering to all guest needs.
Dining Experience: A traditional restaurant serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner with vegetarian options. The on-site coffee shop offers a cosy spot for relaxation.
Local Attractions: Bousra Waterfall is located 37 km from the farmstay, providing scenic views and outdoor activities.

hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Sumeru in Sen Monorom offers a swimming pool with stunning views, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, and a bar, ensuring a comfortable and relaxing stay.
Comfortable Amenities: The hotel features private check-in and check-out services, a shuttle, outdoor fireplace, shared kitchen, outdoor play area, and bicycle parking. Additional facilities include family rooms, balconies, and free on-site private parking.
Dining Experience: A family-friendly restaurant serves French and Cambodian cuisines with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes continental, أƒآ  la carte, and vegetarian selections, complemented by fresh juices and fruits.

Ubicato a Sen Monourom, a 42 km da Bousra Waterfall, Sumeru propone una piscina all'aperto, un parcheggio privato gratuito, un giardino e una terrazza. La struttura offre un bar e un barbecue. L'alloggio mette a disposizione una cucina in comune e il WiFi gratuito.

Presso questo hotel, ogni camera dispone di un balcone con vista sulla piscina. Tutte con bagno privato che comprende una doccia e l'asciugacapelli, le camere di Sumeru vantano anche la vista monti. Tutte le camere presentano una scrivania e un bollitore elettrico.

In struttura أƒآ¨ disponibile una colazione أƒآ  la carte, continentale o vegetariana. Presso questa struttura troverete un ristorante che serve piatti cambogiani e piatti francesi. Su richiesta sono disponibili anche opzioni vegetariane, vegan e senza glutine.

hotels.name: Lub d Siem Reap - Near Pub Street & Angkor Wat
hotels.description_fr:
Featuring Khmer-style decor, Lub d Cambodia offers accommodations in the Wat Bo area of Siem Reap. It features an outdoor swimming pool and guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant or have a drink at the poolside bar. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the property.
It is 290 metres from Siem Reap Art Center Night Market. The vibrant Pub Street and Old Market are 550 metres from Lub d Siem Reap - Near Pub Street & Angkor Wat, while Angkor Wat is 7.8 km away. The nearest airport is Siem Reap Angkor International Airport, which is 45.7 km away. Airport transfers are available at additional charges.
Rooms are air-conditioned. Some units offer en suite bathrooms. Guests staying in the dormitory rooms have access to a personal locker and a shared bathroom.

Elegant Accommodation: Indochine Serenity Boutique in Siem Reap offers a 4-star hotel experience with a swimming pool boasting stunning views, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, and a bar, ensuring a comfortable and relaxing stay.
Comfortable Amenities: The hotel features private check-in and check-out services, a 24-hour front desk, concierge, and full-day security. Additional facilities include a pool bar, outdoor seating area, family rooms, and free on-site parking.
Dining Options: A variety of breakfast options are available, including continental, American, buffet, أƒآ  la carte, vegetarian, and Asian. The family-friendly restaurant serves local specialities, warm dishes, juice, pancakes, cheese, and fruits.

hotels.description_en:
Step into a sanctuary where mornings begin with the golden glow of Angkor Wat just moments away. As the closest hotel to this ancient wonder, "The Community - Siem Reap" offers unparalleled access to Cambodiaأ¢â‚¬â„¢s most iconic treasure, just a 10-minute drive to its timeless gates. Every smile from our team feels like a gift, and every corner of our space tells a story of Cambodiaأ¢â‚¬â„¢s soul. Artisan-crafted walls whisper heritage, meals simmer with generations of love, and your stay becomes a thread in Siem Reapأ¢â‚¬â„¢s brighter future.
Nestled in the city centre, "The Community - Siem Reap" places you at the heart of it all. The Angkor Museum and Royal Palace are a mere 2-minute drive away, while Pub Streetأ¢â‚¬â„¢s vibrant energy beckons just 5 minutes by Tuk-Tuk.
